query:
SELECT
            user_id as "id!: u32",
            user_fullname as "fullname!: String",
            username as "username!: String",
            user_role as "role!: Role"
        FROM audit_log
        WHERE user_id IS NOT NULL
            AND user_fullname IS NOT NULL
            AND username IS NOT NULL
            AND user_role IS NOT NULL
        GROUP BY user_id
        ORDER BY username
